name: nim
description: Generate images and videos and run templated creative workflows with Nim — model discovery, direct generation, and reference-driven editing through the Nim MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Generate images and videos with Nim
interface.longDescription: Nim turns your agent into a creative studio: discover the right model, generate images and video, edit from references, and run templated workflows — all through the Nim MCP.
defaultPrompt: Generate a cinematic product shot with Nim
Turn this image into a 5-second video with Nim
Create a 9:16 social ad for my brand with Nim
Create a 15-second Seedance b-roll ad from my product brief and references
Give me 4 concept variations for this idea with Nim
Update my Nim plugin and skills from GitHub
